ENTITY 100?
[[File:Vixitelabel.png|500x500px|center|link=]]
THE TRAGEDY OF A SLOW DESTRUCTION








I - THE BREAKING POINT
{{Underline|FFFFFF}}
The gloomy office spaces of [[Level 4]] never exactly struck me as "cheery". Dimmed into a cold gray lighting by the overcast environment beyond every gently tapping window, each second spent in this edifice felt slowly but surely crushing on one's soul. While, yes, it does invoke some sense of being back "home", with the patter of rain against the windows almost inducing the sweet scent of petrichor, there's something about this place that still chips away at my hope. Like vultures gnawing at the deceased remains of my memories of a better life.
I rested my face in my palms — my elbows prodded into the desk, and my swiveling chair releasing a light creak as I slouched further. The office was unusually quiet today; where I would otherwise be hearing cacophonies of chatter, there was only whispers complemented by utter silence.
"MITCHELL!" A stern voice rang out from beside me, nearly forcing me to jolt up from my chair.

"Y-yeah?" I stammered out as I faced the young assistant to my left.

"Apologies if that came across as a little startling, but I've got an important task for you. I'm sure you've heard about the death of one of our lead researchers, have you not?" She flipped through dividers in the stocky binder between her hands, eventually encountering a specific set of papers. "I've got a new entity for you to document, believed to be his cause of death." She slid a folder marked "UNDOCUMENTED - E27" across my desk before fading back into the silence.

I stared blank-eyed at the folder with questions erupting in my head, though she had left to her own cubicle before I could sputter out a word. With a new stack of documents on my desk and a large bearing of duty, I was merely left dazed.


{{Underline|FFFFFF}}

{{Collapse|num=2|initial=[[File:Pencildoohickey.png|400x400px|center|link=]]

^ CLICK TO CONTINUE ^
|final= |body=
{{Bititle|titleIconText=X|titleText=|backgroundColor=#006eff|border=#FFFFFF|content=
  '''DESCRIPTION'''
{{Blurimage|width=300px|align=right|file=Enhancedmold.jpg|caption=A sketch of M. desiderium.}} Vixites, going by the scientific name of ''Mensinficiatis desiderium'', are a species of parasitoid lifeform in the kingdom Venatrexima that thrive in damp and humid areas. The structure of a completely formed vixite surrounds the brain, using several hair-like extensions to secure itself to the host. The spores of vixites in particular grow into their full forms at exceptional rates — primarily due to their specialization to the human mind. Closer inspections of vixites' biological structures have confirmed that they possess a wide range of specialized glands, collectively stored in a pair of pseudo-organs known as "gland sacs". Producing complex sums of chemicals which correlate to directing brain activity, a fully formed vixite structure can manipulate the thoughts of its occupied host's brain. While it is unknown what exactly vixites feed on from their hosts, it is known that those infected by the entity tend to experience thoughts relating to comforting memories manifested during one's childhood. By inducing these thoughts, the host's brain becomes more vulnerable to nourishing the vixite instance as a consequence of reduced stress and tension. There are cases of "mental numbing" being more direct as opposed to activating the host's comforting memories to make feeding easier, though these instances only occur under extremely specific conditions. | }}





For the time being, I had completed the document with all the information given. I submitted the current draft for confirmation to publish it — the button emitting a hollow corporate 'ding' as the file uploaded. The end of work hours was near.
the human mind is hardwired to an unwavering desire for knowledge
intelligence has always been their strength — and so, they seek patterns
finding connections, categorizing what lies in your environment
to see it falter in the hands of chaos, withered out of familiarity
to watch the eternally drifting clouds begin to rain down
merely a twisted illusion that lures them into dead ends.
{{Underline|FFFFFF}}
II - GONE WITHOUT A TRACE
{{Underline|FFFFFF}}
I have tossed and turned countless times yet my mind cannot commit itself to resting. I laid open-eyed on a mattress that sunk like sand with my weight, my bones nearly feeling the wooden boards supporting it.

Inevitably through restless struggle, however, I drifted into ephemeral visions of my mind's journey.
...
dreams occur in humans during the REM stage of the sleep cycle
where the mind can depart from reality and engage in its own adventures
a path forged by memories collected along the experience of life
the process merely happens during one's most vulnerable state
but what if that were to be taken advantage of..?
[[File:Sketchglowlinelong.png|600x600px|center|link=]]
DONT YOU REMEMBER BETTER TIMES..? WHEN YOU WHEN YOU FELT TH FELT TH FELT THE AUTHENTIC WARM SUN YOU HAD NO WORRIES! YOU COULD GO BACK! YOU COULD GO BACK.! BACK! IMAGine youRSELF IN THAT MOMENT. CAREFrEE. HAppy. Joyful. FREE you know there is still hope, Its hope. HOPE FOR BETTER TIMES. YOU WOULD EMBRACE THE SIMPLE THINGS IN LIFIFIFIFIFE LIFE. YOU WERE FREE a wise a wise man watches the c WATCHES BETTER TIMES. NOW RELAX. I WANT TO MAKE THIS EASY FOR YOU. I AM YOU. i AM you, MITCHELL HENDERSON, and i want to to make this less stressful. donT THink ABOUT ANYTHING. ITS FOR THE BETTER. ITS ETHEReal ETHEREAL ETHEREA L ET HEREAL E THERE ETHERE THEREAL ETHE
[[File:Sketchglowlinelong.png|600x600px|center|link=]]
ETHeREeal Ethereal dream I had never once experienced before. I shot upright from my mattress in a cold sweat, sharp headaches piercing into my brain. ''What the fuck was that?'' I felt puppeteered by something beyond my understanding. As if an end were approaching. An end I could only experience with shut eyes and a clear mind. Any sense of panic was broken, any screams muffled, any resistance shattered. Everybody else was still resting, still blind to the impending doom approaching. My headaches kept me awake until morning's arrival — an abstract living hell.

...

The chime of a callous bell began to ring, stinging my eyes as each soundwave chewed at the stem of my brain. Each time I flinched in pain my muscles were forcibly relaxed and I drifted out of focus. The bell signaled my waking and the beginning of a new day. Time was meaningless, however, and my desire to return to ETHEREAL DREAMS had overwhelmed me.
I CAN REST JUST A LITTLE LONGER, CAN'T I?
{{Underline|FFFFFF}}
III - INTO COMFORT'S ROTTEN HANDS
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} [[File:Sketchglowlinelong.png|600x600px|center|link=]]
GOOD, GOOD. I'M TRYING TO OFFER YOU A BETTER PLACE. someTHING to FOLLOW - THIS IS GREATNESS THAT YOU'RE YET TO COMPREHEND. COMPREHEN do you REMEMBER THE COOL BREEZE OF A SUMMER MORNING? WHEN YOU'd 'd d GO OUTSIDE, AND RELISH THE GENUINE AIR. GENUINE air NEVER TAINTED by NIGHtmares. MOLDY CARPET IS ALL YOU KNOW IN this PLACE. MOLDY CARPET, buzzing LIGHTS, And A PRISONER OF YOUR MIND. MITCHELL. TRYING TO FIGHT AGAINST IT WILL ONLY separate you further from frreedom. YOU WANT TO BE FREE FROM NIGHTMARES, dont YOU? THE WORLD BEYOND THE COMFORT OF THE THIS BED IS HELLISH. DONT rise. RECOGNIZE THE BLISS OF WHAT'S BEING OFFERED TO YOU, YOU WILL BE FREE FROM MINDLESS IN INSTINCT OF SURVIVAL., THAT WILL LEAVE YOUR LEAVE YOUR LEAVE YOUR LEAVE YOUR LE EAVE YOUR WORRIES. IF YOU STEP IN THE DIRECTION RIGHT FOR YOU.
Yes, I understand. This is what I want. I want to break myself away from the stresses of my form. To part myself from what limits me and offer myself to my lavish destiny.
ISN'T THAT SO BAD? NOW LEAN CLOSER. REMEMBER WHAT MADE YOU SO CAREFREEEEE in your dreamLIKE EXPERIENCEs OF YOUR YOUTH. SMILE AT THE FACT THAT THIS WILL BE AN ETERNAL REALITY. BEFORE You WERE DRAGGED INTO SULLEN PURGATORY. you dont find satisfaction in your current life, DO YOU? LEAN TOWARDS ETHEREAL DREAMS, WHERE YOU'll...LLLLLLLLLLLLLLL BE HAPPY. YOU'll BE HAPPY., IF YOU FOLLooOOW MY LEAD.
I feel more free with each step i take towards my ETERNAL DREAMS. Maybe this is what I was meant to be. Not VEXATED by stress. Not trapped in VORTEXES of turmoil. No longer stuck documenting VENATREXIMA_
[[File:Sketchglowlinelong.png|600x600px|center|link=]]
By those words, I'd been reminded of something that broke me away from my delusions. Instinct turned me against an incoming providence in favor of seeking answers; I heaved my body from the bed and impelled each foot forward in search of anything to connect the dots. Wars raged against an inexplicable determination to move onward as I trudged to the office cubicles. A digital clock read "1:39 P.M.". Work hours, yet not a soul was present. "UNDOCUMENTED - E27" read the front of a folder in handwritten pen. A new species to be discovered, yet I only knew impending doom. Sliding a paper from its laminated pockets, my eyes darted to one specific line of text:

"Victims infected by ''Mensinficiatis desiderium'' experience sudden severe episodes of depressive activity, with any motivation to act on most basic tasks being numbed out by a cosmic sense of exclusion."

"There is no known cure to infection by vixite."
{{Underline|FFFFFF}}
IV - A LOSING BATTLE
{{Underline|FFFFFF}}
The nexus of answers was held between my hands — it told me the only way out was death. I had never been one to believe in an all-powerful creator, though I believed my fate was stitched together with a sick humor in its merciless eyes. All I knew was an unwavering frustration at Death's workings that faltered as my head sunk to the ground. The world spun around me in a chaotic dance. I was caught in the grand stage's spotlight. Walls darkened. The floor consumed me. The spotlight had peered ever closer into my dread-ridden eyes as a heavenly luminance surrounded me. I was forced into submission; my soul's fibers slipped away from my physical form as I ascended to its glaring embrace...
[[File:Oopsiedaisies.png|500x500px|center|link=]]
...
'''BACKROOMS TODAY:'''

LOCAL KAUER NEWS
[[File:Today!!!.png|200x200px|center|link=]] '''RESEARCHER MITCHELL HENDERSON FOUND DEAD''' ---- K.R.O. documenter Mitchell Henderson was recently found dead near his desk on October 18th, 2044. Various sources point to the cause of death being an unknown parasitic entity whose properties eventually led to slowed brain activity, though the accuracy of these claims is disputed. The entity in question, known as vixites in unofficial reports, may have been spread to Henderson via spore contamination of folders located at his desk. In the following days before his death, Mitchell Henderson had isolated himself further from the main Kauer location in Level 4, where witnesses state that "he would be missing for hours on end". All K.R.O. members at the location have been evacuated to mitigate the risks of potential spread.
...
your time for living has long since dissipated, mitchell.
you were never meant for your broken, soul-crushing life.
you are my subsistence. you are the free man you wanted to be.
in making my functions easier, i gave you the happy ending you needed.
in a sense, you are unbound. sent back to your maker; freedom.
after all,
life always finds a way. even through the tragedy of a slow destruction.
